title: aspidium umbrosum
intro: Aspidium umbrosum, also known as the Umbrella Fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Aspidium umbrosum include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
